Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 23 

GDC_ABV_OOPT_AMT 

LABEL: Gross Drug Cost Above Part D Out-of-Pocket Threshold (GDCA) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the portion of the gross drug cost for the prescription drug fill that was covered by Part 
D’s catastrophic coverage. 

Under Part D, a beneficiary qualifies for catastrophic coverage when his/her true out-of-pocket 
(TrOOP) costs reach a
